message:
fix(mobile): elevate header z-index and add explicit close button for menu overlay

Fixes z-index stacking issues where mobile menu overlay could appear behind
other fixed elements, and improves mobile menu UX with a dedicated close button.

site-header.tsx:
- Bump header z-index from z-50 to z-[90] to stay above modal overlays
- Elevate mobile menu toggle button to z-[95] to remain above open menu
- Add explicit type="button" to prevent form submission in edge cases
- Add dedicated X close button in top-right of mobile menu overlay
- Close menu on backdrop tap (onClick handler on overlay container)
- Prevent nav content clicks from bubbling to backdrop (stopPropagation)

use-body-scroll-lock.ts:
- Lock BOTH body AND html element overflow to fully prevent iOS rubber-banding
- Store and restore htmlOverflow and htmlPaddingRight alongside body styles
- Add scrollbar compensation padding to documentElement for complete layout shift prevention
- Use requestAnimationFrame for scroll position restoration (smoother unlock)
- Cache body and documentElement references to avoid repeated DOM queries

The html element overflow lock is critical for iOS Safari where body overflow
alone doesn't prevent the overscroll bounce effect on the html element.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
